  - Pass maintainership to submitter

 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Perl module to handle WorldPay Junior for payment services
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
